untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection requires multi-bar price structure analysis (two peaks at different levels, retracement percentage of 40%, lowest low identification between peaks). The allowed indicators cannot express the geometric pattern conditions: 'first peak > second peak retrace > second peak > breakdown below lowest-low-between-peaks'. This requires candlestick pattern recognition or lookback window analysis not supported by the indicator list.
translation_notes: Translated volume confirmation condition (volume picks up on breakdown) to volume > historical 20-bar average. Used pivot as a proxy for confirmation point (lowest low between peaks). Entry assumes price breaks below support with elevated volume. Exit uses mean reversion to 20-day SMA as a reasonable reversal condition per RULE 8. However, the core Double Top pattern structure cannot be properly encoded with available indicators.
